response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for an entry/junior role, with 13+ years of experience as a Senior/Staff engineer across fullstack, embedded, and AI infrastructure. Technical skills strongly exceed requirements (TypeScript, React, Node, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/MCP work), and Berlin location fits the on-site requirement. However, the seniority mismatch raises serious concerns about retention, compensation expectations, and engagement on junior-scoped work. Basic German may also be a factor for an on-site German renovation/energy consulting context. Worth a screening call to gauge motivation for a deliberate step down.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/React/Node fullstack background well beyond the bar
Hits all nice-to-haves: LLM/MCP work, AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, OCR-adjacent tooling
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying for junior role suggests likely short tenure or comp mismatch
Only basic German for an on-site German construction/energy consulting product
No demonstrated PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (uses MongoDB and other stacks)

key_factors.factor: Basic German for on-site DE role
